text:
, subtitled as , is a learning book that teaches anatomy through the illustrations of the Attack on Titan manga. It was written by Hideto Fuse.

Synopsis

Attack on Titan is a popular manga that attracts many readers due to its bizarre and overwhelmingly powerful designs. What is the source of the appeal of a work that has become a social phenomenon? And what is the Titan that is still shrouded in mystery in the story? We will tackle these two big "questions" using the knowledge of the discipline of "art anatomy." Presenting a new book with an unprecedented attempt.
